items.name: Aglio e Olio
items.desc: Pizza tossed with extra virgin olive oil, sauteed garlic, anchovies, finished with a touch of sea salt and topped with fresh shrimp.

items.name: Seafood Marinara
items.desc: Pasta tossed in a rich tomato marinara sauce with shrimp, mussels, clams, and squid.

items.name: Carbonara
items.desc: Spaghetti tossed in a creamy sauce with bacon, parmesan, and a hint of black pepper.

items.name: Hawaiian
items.desc: Pizza topped with savory ham, sweet pineapple, and melted mozzarella on a golden crust.

items.name: Beef Shawarma
items.desc: Pizza topped with seasoned beef shawarma, fresh vegetables, and melted cheese on a golden crust.

items.name: Lola Lys Signature
items.desc: Our signature pizza loaded with salami, ground beef, mozzarella, olives, green peppers, and plenty of cheesy goodness.

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.desc: Tender chicken breast in a light breadcrumb crust. Served with a side of fries.

items.name: Fries
items.desc: Thin-cut, crispy fries tossed in salt.

items.name: Flavored Fries
items.desc: Choose from Cheese or Sour Cream Herb.

items.name: Americano
items.desc: Two shots of espresso combined with hot water to create a smooth, robust profile.

items.name: Vanilla Latte
items.desc: Two shots of espresso combined with steamed milk and a touch of sweet vanilla.

items.name: Caramel Macchiato
items.desc: Two shots of espresso marked over steamed milk and sweet vanilla, finished with a caramel drizzle.

items.name: White Mocha
items.desc: Two shots of espresso combined with steamed milk and sweet white chocolate.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.desc: Two shots of espresso combined with equal parts steamed milk and airy foam.
